feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Receipt Management - Irritants to follow the receipts to do
entry.content:
Hello, thank you by advance for your help.

Since we deployed in SAP for purchases, we have a problem regarding receipts. The major problem is for the moment we haven't found a way to clearly identify for the users the reception he has to do on the month, on the year, and on all the purchase orders he has. And the problem regarding this is as no receipt is put on the purchase order, it is impossible to put an invoice on the purchase order, and so sometimes we are late to pay a supplier.

Can you give me some ideas on the topic? Are there views/apps that allow us to follow easily the receipts on a specific user or on a specific month? Have you found this problems with other clients before and do you know if there are some solutions?

We're very open to new ideas because for the moment we don't know how to manage it and it is a very big irritant for our users and also for our purchasing team that is completing the invoices.

Thanks a lot for your reply and have a good day.

Romane QUAGLIARINI.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Configure Value Mapping : how to fetch in ABAP Cloud ?
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, we have the app "Configure Value Mapping".

Is there a way to fetch those configured values mappings in ABAP Cloud ?  (CDS ? OData ?)

entry.title: Issue in VL10B – Multiple Outbound Deliveries Created for Single STO
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have created a Stock Transfer Order (STO) Purchase Order with two line items. While processing the delivery using VL10B, the system is generating two separate outbound delivery numbers for the two line items.

However, the requirement is to create only one outbound delivery containing both line items of the STO.

Issue Details:

  • STO PO created with 2 line items

entry.title: Training material for situation handling as we intend to implement for the Customer on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please provide some training material for situation handling as we intend to implement for a customer from the scratch?

Regards

Ashish

entry.title: Automatic Account Determination of OBYC - GBB (VAX/VAY) and WRX
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have material and business buy-and-sell transactions for intercompany purposes? Created a PO and made the GR entry which post to regular GR/IR instead IC GR/IR account. could you kindly advise what the SAP standard solution is to post intercompany (IC) entries into separate GL accounts during PGR and PGI?

Additionally, could you clarify when VAX and VAY are triggered in the Public Cloud? We have consistently observed only VAY entries and have not come across the VAX process—could you please explain this?

 

Best Regards

LakshmiNarayana

entry.title: Picking Number Range Configuration by Organizational Unit - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We would like to request clarification regarding the configuration possibilities for picking document number ranges in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Business Scenario:
Our organization operates multiple sales organizations with different company codes and plants. For internal tracking and audit purposes, the business would like the picking document numbers to reflect the organizational unit that created the document. For example:

  • Picking documents created in one company code should follow a specific number range (e.g., XXXXX–XXXXX).
  • Picking documents created in another company code should follow a different number range (e.g., YYYYY–YYYYY).

Please let us know if it is possible with flexible numbering as well.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: want to generate trial balance based on business place in public cloud
entry.content: want to generate trial balance based on business place in public cloud

entry.title: Moving Average Price Not Updated and Zero Valuation at Goods Receipt in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are currently facing an issue related to material costing and valuation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and we would appreciate your insights.

Context:

  • Scope Item 7NH (Universal Cost Component Breakdown) is activated.
  • We created a ticket with SAP to activate missing content related to scope items activated before release 2602. The synchronization has been completed, but no changes were observed in system behavior.
  • We have also recently created new valuation classes, which generated new G/L accounts.

Issue Description:

Case 1: Moving Average Price Not Updated
For materials that already have a valuation from the closing balance of December 31st (previous fiscal year), the system keeps the same value and does not update the moving average price after new transactions.

Case 2: Goods Receipt Not Valuated (0 Value)
For materials without any prior valuation (no opening balance), the system posts the Goods Receipt with a value of zero. As a result, the material is not valuated.

Additional Observation:
The manufacturing cost is correctly calculated and visible in the app "Analyze Production Costs – Event-Based", but it is not reflected in the material valuation or accounting postings.

Questions:

  • Could the creation of new valuation classes (and related G/L accounts) be the root cause of this issue?
  • Are there additional configuration steps required after creating new valuation classes in combination with scope item 7NH?
  • Is there any dependency with other scope items (e.g., inventory valuation or event-based production costing) that could explain this behavior?
  • Are we missing any integration step between CO (costing) and FI (material valuation)?

Any guidance or similar experiences would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

entry.title: Few important app is not available - FB01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to create below to posting but we are unable to find the dedicated app to achieve the result.

Entry 1:

Vendor 1 Dr.        KES 1000
Vendor 2 Cr.        KES 1000

Entry 2:

GL Account Dr.     KES 5000
Vendor 1 Cr.         KES 1000
Vendor 2 Cr.         KES 2000
Vendor 3 Cr.         KES 2000

Please let me know which app I should use to post these two entries. I tried Post Journal General Entries app but not able to use the supplier account. I have also checked KBA note 3428168.

Thanks,
Brijesh Singh
CB: CB9980000021

entry.title: Edit access to user's timesheet
entry.content:
We need to provide edit access to a user so they can submit someone else’s timesheet on their behalf. Could you please guide us on how to provide this access, if applicable?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: creation of new depreciation keys
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we are looking forward to create new depreciations keys to select in assets .

 

However, I could not find any customizing options for it and in sap documentation shows we need to request for it in sap help .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: TDS Adjustment Entry and impact on the TDS report
entry.content:
During transactions such as MIRO or FB60, if TDS was deducted incorrectly (e.g., 2% instead of 1%, or vice versa), the correct approach to pass a rectification or adjustment entry.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tax Code Valid Date Change
entry.content:
Hi,

we have an discussion point regarding the tax code change valid period and ELSTER tax formular in Germany.

Its about the alignment of the tax code items in the ELSTER formular, specially time depended taxes change subannual.

Example thought:

-> Change of the tax code from 19 to 16% per 1. July XXXX

->  still in July/August some invoices will have the old tax code (19%)

Please explain us the correct handling with the VAT return handling with the tax code items.

How SAP will handle the subannual change of an tax code values, because for the ELSTER form we will need two tax code groups for 16 and 19%, its not possible to only handle it with one tax group.

Their will be still invoices with the old tax code value.

 

With best regards,

Josi

entry.title: Controle the issuance for consumption w.r.t prod. order in 2-3 different days from store
entry.content:
Dear Team,

As per the requirement, the business wants to control or follow the rule for sequential issuance of some consumable materialsw.r.t. production order in 2-3 different days. As we know on production order creation reservation is getting created automatically into the system. There should be some provision or system or features  that suppose out of 20 components in single production order/reservation, the production people can able to request to store department to issue 10 components in one day, for other left components on another days. So that the reason for delay in issuance from store can be tracked and  space constraint the system could able to match the standard practice of business.

entry.title: Is this possible to cancel Billing Document automatically In SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

IS it possible to cancel E-way Bill E-invoice and Billing document automatically in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

Any BADI or other solution using the same we can achieve the result.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Default Issuing Plant and Issuing storage location in STO
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement from our customer. They wanted to save a few steps when creating an STO i.e. defaulting value on a couple of fields. Most of the fields for default values are supported by SAP i.e. through user settings - default values and master data, except the two fields below.

  1. Supplying Plant - can this be added as another option in the user settings i.e. default values?
  2. Issuing storage location - is this possible in Public Cloud?

Regards,

Fideli

entry.title: Create the new material type copying from HALB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I’m working on S/4HANA Public Edition and just set up a custom material type by referencing HALB. I want materials with this new type to behave exactly like HALB across Purchasing, MRP, and Costing.

I’d like to know if creating custom material types is fully supported as a standard practice in the Public Edition. Also, are there
any constraints or risks I should be aware of regarding its impact on other business processes?

entry.title: Skipped Set Up Organizational Structure?how can I fixed it
entry.content:
In the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, I did not set up Company Code A through CBC. Instead, I directly created Company Code A in the public cloud customizing environment, similar to how it's done in GUI. Later, when I tried to configure the organizational structure in CBC, I received an error stating that Company Code A already exists. Now I want to delete Company Code A, but after searching for information, I found that in the public cloud system, a company code cannot be directly deleted—it can only be deactivated.

My questions are:

① Since CBC is not configured yet, can I directly delete Company Code A in the customizing environment if it has no related configurations?

② After deactivating it in the customizing environment, can I start over and configure Company Code A in the CBC environment, then activate and use it in the customizing environment? Or do I have to use a new Company Code B?

entry.title: BP TAN exemption details update as a mass
entry.content:
Dear sir

In business partner, Supplier: country- spec.Enh view If "Withhld tax type" field is G1 to be update the "Exemption reason" filed  & Exemption number, Exempt from, Exempt To field to update as a mass. How to update.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FUE consumption calculation with development price category
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm in an implementation project of SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition. The Starter, Dev (customizing and development tenant) and Test system has been provisioned. Production system has not been provisioned yet.

In the development tenant of dev system, I have 4 business users of development price category which consumes 8 FUE. When I check the FUE consumption in SAP for me, I see the measured value 8.

Then I go to development tenant, and remove business roles of development price category from 3 business users, and only leave 1 business user of development price category. Then the utilized value is supposed to be updated to 1, and measured value to 2.

However, when I check the FUE consumption in SAP for me again, it doesn't change. Utilized value is still 4, and measured value is still 8.

So is there any business users in other tenant also counted as utilization except in development tenant, or it's just because SAP for me has been refreshed instantly?

Thanks.
